name: recoil_app_play_state_on_wnd_activate
description: RecoilApp_PlayState::OnWndActivate forwards nonzero activation to HudUiMgr::TriggerCurrentLayoutOnActivated and does nothing for zero activation.
known_limits: The caller smoke verifies both the inactive branch and active branch against a test HudLayoutBase OnActivated hook.
VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through recoil_app_create_main_wnd; Binary Ninja byte comparison remains pending for the RecoilApp play-state cluster.
